onboard: Insert first valid key → ON ≥3 sec → OFF/remove. Within 15 sec insert second valid key → ON ~10 sec (SKIM light flashes + chime). Within 50 sec insert new uncut/unprogrammed key → ON ~10 sec until chime + SKIM light illuminates 3 sec = success. Supports up to 8 keys total.
addKey: Use on-board 2-key sequence above. Requires 2 already-programmed keys plus the new cut blank. No PIN, no tool needed.
allKeysLost: Read 4-digit SKIM PIN via OBD with DMAX / Autel IM608 / T-Code PRO, then use programmer to clear all keys and enroll new key. Alternatively: dealer Secure Program Method (PIN by VIN available from locksmith data services for pre-2004 models; 2004+ requires OBD or EEPROM read due to CAN system).
pinSource: OBD read (DMAX / Autel) — required only for AKL or single-key scenarios; on-board 2-key method needs no PIN
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, left of steering column, above brake pedal
securityWait: none
specialTool: null — on-board DIY supported. For AKL: DMAX, Autel IM608, or T-Code PRO

onboard: Insert first valid key → ON ≥3 sec → OFF/remove. Within 15 sec insert second valid key → ON ~10 sec (SKIM light flashes + chime). Within 50 sec insert new cut blank → ON ~10 sec until chime + SKIM light = success.
addKey: Use on-board 2-key sequence above. Requires 2 already-programmed keys. ID46/Hitag2 chip — token cloning also viable as alternative.
allKeysLost: Professional programmer required (Autel IM608, Xhorse VVDI2, T-Code PRO). Read 4-digit SKIM PIN via OBD, delete all keys, enroll new key. PIN by VIN available from locksmith data services for some trim/VIN ranges; OBD read most reliable.
pinSource: OBD read (DMAX / Autel IM608) — required for AKL only
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, left of steering column, above brake pedal
securityWait: none
specialTool: null — on-board DIY supported. For AKL: Autel IM608 / Xhorse VVDI2 / T-Code PRO

addKey: Professional programmer required (Autel IM608, Xhorse VVDI2). Read PIN via OBD, run add-key routine. No DIY on-board method for 2010+ per locksmithkeyless.com (2009 may support on-board — confirm by year). FOBIK remote requires OBD programmer.
allKeysLost: Professional programmer required. Read 4-digit SKIM PIN via OBD (Autel IM608 / DMAX / T-Code PRO), delete all keys, enroll new key via OBDII. Dealer Secure Program Method as fallback.
pinSource: OBD read (Autel IM608 / DMAX)
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, left of steering column, above brake pedal

addKey: Professional programmer required (Autel IM608, Xhorse VVDI2, Lonsdor K518, AlfaOBD + OBDLink MX+). Read 4-digit PIN via OBD 'Read PIN Code' routine (found in WCM/RFH > Routines), then run 'Program Ignition FOBIK' routine. 2018 models require SGW bypass cable (12+8 adapter) or AutoAuth subscription before OBD access.
allKeysLost: Professional programmer required. Read 4-digit PIN via OBD, delete all FOBIKs, enroll new FOBIK. PIN obtainable via OBD (AlfaOBD, Appcar DiagFCA, Autel) or from dealer parts desk at no charge. 2018 requires SGW bypass first.
pinSource: OBD read (AlfaOBD / Appcar DiagFCA / Autel IM608) or dealer parts desk
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, left of steering column, above brake pedal
securityWait: 2018 only: SGW bypass cable installation before any OBD communication

addKey: Professional programmer required. FCA SGW bypass mandatory first (12+8 cable or AutoAuth). Then use Autel IM608 Pro / Xhorse VVDI2 / Lonsdor K518 + SGW adapter via guided OBD procedure to enroll Hitag AES smart key. Non-clonable chip.
allKeysLost: AKL requires professional programmer with SGW bypass. Dealer may be needed for server-side VIN validation on some configurations. Use programmer guided procedure (Autel IM608 Pro AKL mode + SGW bypass cable).

onboard: Same 2-key on-board sequence as RAM 1500 2002-2005: first key ON ≥3 sec → OFF/remove → within 15 sec second key ON ~10 sec (chime/SKIM light) → within 50 sec new key ON ~10 sec until confirmation.
addKey: Use on-board 2-key sequence. Requires 2 programmed keys. Texas 4D64 chip is directly clonable as alternative (no SKIM enrollment needed).
allKeysLost: Read 4-digit SKIM PIN via OBD (DMAX / Autel IM608 / T-Code PRO), clear all keys, enroll new. PIN by VIN available for pre-2004. 4D64 cloning via dedicated cloner (no SKIM enrollment) is AKL alternative if cutting from code.

onboard: 2007-2017 only: Insert first valid Sentry Key → ON ~3-5 sec → OFF/remove. Within 15 sec insert second valid Sentry Key → ON; after ~10 sec SKIS light flashes + chime = programming mode entered. Within 60 sec insert new cut blank → ON until SKIS light stops flashing and illuminates solid 3 sec = success. 2018 JK: SGW present — on-board sequence may not be available; use professional tool.
addKey: 2007-2017: on-board 2-key sequence above. 2018 JK: professional programmer + SGW bypass (12+8 cable or AutoAuth) required. OHT692427AA remote-head key trims always require professional OBD programmer for remote enrollment.
allKeysLost: 2007-2017: professional programmer required (Autel IM608, Xhorse VVDI2). Read 4-digit SKIM PIN via OBD, delete all keys, enroll new. 2018: SGW bypass cable additionally required.

specialTool: null for 2007-2017 on-board add. For AKL or 2018: Autel IM608 / Xhorse VVDI2; 2018 additionally requires FCA SGW bypass cable (12+8 adapter) or AutoAuth

Some users report needing glove box drop-down to access SGW connector for physical bypass. Use programmer guided procedure for OHT1130261 Hitag AES smart flip key.
allKeysLost: AKL requires professional programmer with SGW bypass. Use Autel IM608 Pro AKL guided procedure. Some VIN/build-date combinations require dealer server-side validation. Delete all keys, enroll new flip key.
